headline: Amgen Inc (NASDAQ:AMGN) Q1 Earnings Beat on EPS but Revenue Miss Sends Shares Lower
summary: Amgen's Q1 earnings beat EPS estimates at $5.15, but revenue fell slightly short at $8.62B, causing a 1.8% after-market stock dip amid competition concerns.

headline: Amgen's Numbers Are Out: It Gets To Keep Its Cholesterol Crown — For Now
summary: Amgen widely beat the Street's first-quarter expectations late Thursday, slightly ticking its 2026 guidance higher.

headline: Amgen’s (NASDAQ:AMGN) Q1 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Biotech company Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 5.8% year on year to $8.62 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $37.8 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $5.15 per share was 8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones Roars As Industrials Rescue Wall Street From Meta-Led Tech Slide
summary: A sharp rotation gripped Wall Street at midday Thursday as blue-chip industrials and healthcare powered the Dow higher, masking a savage selloff in mega-cap tech after Meta and Microsoft warned on AI infrastructure spending.
